content: Astro content collections (v5+) use defineCollection() in src/content.config.ts with a glob() loader (astro/loaders) to ingest Markdown/MDX from any filesystem path via micromatch patterns; getCollection(name, filterFn) returns typed entries, and calling render(entry) yields <Content/> plus a headings list. Zod schemas on the collection give type-safe frontmatter. Case-study pages are generated at build time via getStaticPaths + getCollection, one dynamic route per entry.
